caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a small V-neck and a thin dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her collar. In the bottom left and bottom center of the frames, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". The woman is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements change slightly across the sequence. In the first frame, her mouth is partially open. By the second frame, her mouth opens wider as she speaks. In the third frame, she begins to close her mouth, and in the final frame, she is seen with her mouth open again, continuing to speak. Her head remains centered and stable throughout the clip.
